title: An Encode-then-Decompose Approach to Unsupervised Time Series Anomaly Detection on Contaminated Training Data--Extended Version

formulas.final_latex: \begin{array}{l} I _ {\mathrm{UBA}} (X, Y) \triangleq \mathbb {E} _ {p (x, y)} [ \log q (x | y) ] + h (X) \\ = \mathbb {E} _ {p (x, y)} [ \log p (x) - \log Z (y) + f (x, y) ] + h (X) \\ = \mathbb {E} _ {p (x, y)} [ f (x, y) ] - \mathbb {E} _ {p (y)} [ \log Z (y) ] \tag {2} \\ \end{array}
